prose: You ran today like a rest day should look — easy movement, a light 253-calorie deficit, nothing that taxes the muscle you're trying to build. The one gap was protein: 72g is well short of where you need to be, and on a recovery day that's exactly when your body wants the building blocks. Eat slow tonight, hydrate, get to bed early — and tomorrow, make protein the first thing you plan, not the afterthought.
